company.name: Acme Cybersecurity Training
company.what_you_do: Hands-on cybersecurity training and certification for enterprise security teams — cuts new-hire ramp time and keeps senior staff sharp on emerging threats. Certifications are recognized by NIST and major enterprise buyers.

icp.description: Mid-market and enterprise CISOs, VPs of Security, Directors of Security Operations, and Heads of Information Security. Especially in regulated industries: financial services, healthcare, SaaS, and critical infrastructure. Director-and-above seniority.

past_campaigns_text: Q1 CISO outbound via Evanta governing bodies + RSA 2024 speaker list. Reply rate jumped to ~18% when we personalized from Evanta spotlight blogs, referencing the CISO's stated top challenge. Generic 'training platform' cold opens flopped. Conference speaker angle didn't work unless we referenced a specific talk.
